intro: Gonialoe desmetiana, also known as × Gonialoaloe desmetiana, is a hybrid succulent plant in the family Asphodelaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities that may aid in wound healing, reducing pain and inflammation, and protecting against oxidative stress. The bioactive constituents of × Gonialoaloe desmetiana include aloin, aloe-emodin, and other anthraquinones, which contribute to its medicinal effects. × Gonialoaloe desmetiana is often used to make herbal preparations such as gel, cream, and ointment, which are commonly used to soothe skin irritations, burns, and wounds.
